play_store_reviews.text: This app is not the clubhouse for IOS devices. It is a team sharing and management app that lets you collaborate on projects! I hit sign up, put on the waiting list, then got invited by my team to join the meeting. After using many other apps to keep me and my team's projects organize, I found one that actually works without to much extra add ons that can get in the way sometimes.

Hello! If you are developers of iOS version I'd offer you to make sign up with purchase, I feel this way will solve problem with sign up even on iOS as you know there's no way to sign up just too easy, only by the someone's invite. So also you can earn a bit, and the users will be happy for signing up by purchase, but set up affordable price! Good luck!

I've heard about others networking with this app and decided to give it a go. Opened the app just to realize there's no way to sign up. I'm guessing only iPhone users are able to use it currently. Until the sign up button issue is fixed, I don't see why the app is currently available for download in Google play.

There is no sign up bottom any where, the last thing on the interface when you download the app is forgot password. There is no blue bottonwith signup anywhere. Those saying that there is a blue bottom should please let us know if the blue button is not compatible with Android phones. I can't say if the app is good or not since I haven't signed in.

Might be great app for someone who already has an iOS device and wants to use it ALSO on Android. Unfortunately useless for me, cause I already have an invite and can't use it because I don't have any iOS device. The app just put me on a "waiting list" when I tried to signup; why doesn't it just allow to copy-paste the invite code? It'll be pretty late when it'll be available cause the discussion I was interested in will be simply gone.

Don't have your 'Sign Up' option be a waitlist via Google Forms. It would be more excusable if on the Google Play page you stated there was a waitlist, rather than being greedy and bumping up that download count with a hundreds of thousands of people that can't even use the app.

For those that seem to lack the ability to read. This app was released June of 2019. The clubhouse your looking for was released 2020. As for the sign up button that people seem to miss but I have no idea how you miss it. It's the big blue button at the bottom of the screen, right under forgot password. How do you see forgot password and not see sign up. I have no more words.

I normally don't leave reviews; but, I saw a lot of android users having trouble signing up. I did not exprience any of the issues by the other users. The sign up button was not obscured and the registration was straightforward. I was on the waiting list within 2 minutes or pressing install. Phone: Google Pixel 3a XL

One of the best productivity apps around. I've been using Clubhouse for around 3 years to manage various pieces of work. Great set up to create stories and tasks to be more productive in all either home projects or developing a start up and building software.

I managed to get past the silly log in issue only to not be able to finish my first test task in the app. Why? Because the app seems to just de a browser wrapper that doesn't have the ability to scroll. I'll try it again on PC. But the first 5 minutes on this were an uphill battle. Clubhouse, you're wasting valuable influencer input (how I got here) by having your app perform poorly.

Well, there's actually no sign up button that I can clearly see. HOWEVER... I'm not one of those idiots looking for the other Clubhouse (the social media app). I can still sign up in their website and that's no deterrent for me, because you know, I can actually use tech and read descriptions, unlike some people. Anyhow, I'm ditching JIRA for this. Love the app. For those of you leaving 1 star reviews for the WRONG app, buy an IOS device. Hope Google cracks down on these reviews.

I understand after reading what the app is about and also the reviews. This app is not the social media one. Guys it not hard to read something, go and change your review rating or delete it. Its not their fault that you downloaded an app that sounds like another. This app is for different purposes and they are coping flack left right and centre. I hope this rating makes a difference

!NOT THE CLUBHOUSE YOU KEEP HEARING ABOUT! This is not the right clubhouse if you're looking for the one you keep hearing people talk about. THIS IS NOT THE SOCIAL MEDIA APP CLUBHOUSE! REPEAT, This is a DIFFERENT app. THE CLUBHOUSE YOU WANT ISN'T AVAILABLE ON ANDROID. This app works well though if you're looking for something that this app is made for, don't listen to the people who have been reviewing it recently, they are upset because they think they found the other clubhouse.

Wasted time to sign up. You get NO opportunities, awareness or ability to try something that was recommended. When you sign up with your email after installing the so called app you get the following message and request to shop while you wait. Oh and wait til you see the offerings there. A joke here and waste of time. On a waitlist for several weeks to see nothing. Don't waste your time or you will get this: "Join our waitlist and we'll let you know when we open up signups on our mobile app"

I just wanted to download and help out because Clubhouse definitely doesn't deserve this that happened. For all those coming, this is not the chat app clubhouse and the app you may be looking for is available on IOS only. Looking forward to seeing Clubhouse rise back up.

Not sure why they aren't allowing sign up for the mobile app. Just a waiting list. Frustrating when the people you follow ask you to check out their content on the app. I'm assuming only iphone users can access it.

I downloaded the app and couldn't get passed the sign up. When I created my username and password, it asks me what describes me. Then when I clicked CEO and click 'Next' it says that username does not exist or something to that affect. I tried several times and it keeps saying the same thing. So when I start over, it says the username/URL is taken.

Saw your Gary Vee promotion in Instagram. .. Spent 10 minutes at the login screen.. tried to sign in with Google.. never worked.. deleted.. sorry... I really like the idea... if I see an ad in a year I'll download again. I see a lot of reviews of people who download cannot access app. I had to answer no to the survey questions. Good luck

It's PROJECT MANAGEMENT SOFTWARE. And it's a great companion to the web version. It's not a social audio app. Idiots. Clubhouse.io - I'm sure you have already, but please try and work with Google to get the reviews for the "other" clubhouse removed.

Friends, please read the app description before downloading it and leaving a negative review. This isn't the audio based Clubhouse app and you can figure that out yourself by taking 10 seconds to read what it is you're downloading :) All the best to the people who work for this Clubhouse and had to deal with all these ignorant reviews.

Guys. Do NOT rate this app a 1 star just because this isn't the one you were looking for. I have not used this app because I don't need to manage any business, but I decided that I should download and rate it so its rating doesn't fall because of people who don't read application descriptions.

The interface is good, and easy for new users actually, i'm an Industrial Engineering guy and it helps me. I was wondering why people give it 1 star just because they think its the same clubhouse on IOS, And they wrong about it?, Seriously you guys that do this(giving 1 star because you not reading first) are the type of people that blame others for your own mistakes 🤣🤣🤣. Don't worry Clubhouse Project Management, I Give You 5 Stars because your App is actually helpful for people like me 😉😉.

Greeting, developers, I've just downloaded the app on my Samsung Note phone (Android), but there is no Sign up button. I saw some screenshots from Clubhouse Mobile web page, but the button is definitely missing on my mobile app (tried holding it both horizontally and vertically). Can anyone look at this issue?

This app isn't the same iPhone. After using phones for a year and downloading and using clubhouse there, this clubhouse is just a fake rip off which doesn't perform as well. So many issues. iPhone app store I rather over the Google store. They didn't even keep the same icon image for the andriod app. This app is fake.

Clubhouse has to be the most useless thing ever developed. Using the app on my phone and it's making a 4 gig RAM hang and overheat. If there was a way to give a zero star, I would. What kind of useless project management solution is this? I'd rather use Excel than this nonsense.

Just an FYI...This app is for software engineers and is NOT the Clubhouse social media networking app. Please do not download this if that's what you are looking for. At this time, the Clubhouses networking app is only available to iPhone users, but an Android app is in development. Hope this helps!

I enjoyed using the app. I've tried so many apps on play store for management of tasks and i don't like anyone. Until i came across clubhouse. I can now mange my tasks and my team's tasks efficiently and effortless manner. Thanks guys.

This is one of the best app I've seen it really helped me, it is a platform lets people chat in real time, share stories, collaborate, and bounce ideas off of each other using their voice without the need for a lot of other equipment. Thanks for this app it made things easy

After waiting over a year for it to be available on Android, still issues creating an account. It's like you don't want users, and it keeps redirecting to the wrong browsers and saying blocked proxy. Forget it!

Everywhere on the Internet says this app is great but I can't seem to find my way around it. Change my profile pic n bio, all that sizzle. Its really annoying me. I'm on android so I don't know if this app needs updating on android or something. I'm gonna keep the app for when it does update so I can get used it and hope it gets better like it is on ios. But until then it's 2 stars

Ok for those who have an Iphone there may be a sign up button, but for Android there isn't. Yes it says forgot password and thats it. It will allow you to login via Google account but when you do, it says user not found. Same with using an SSO to login. I am technologically savvy and the other Android users are correct in saying there is NO button to sign up. Maybe this app was created for IPhone users only. If so it should be removed from the Google play store for Android. Or allow Android user
THIS ISN'T THE SOCIAL MEDIA APP YOU ARE LOOKING FOR. Installed in order to give the ratings. The sign up button is visible, as well as a Google sign in option. Didn't test the app.

Calling back for people who called one starers dumb. Hi. Look through the mirror. This is not the app so it should be mentioned clearly in the app info. Therefore giving five stars to an app that doesn't work makes you super dumb, or, a team member paid to rate.
For everyone that can't find the sign up button, it's literally a big blue rectangle at the bottom of your screen when you go to login. App works fine 👍

THIS IS NOT THE CLUBHOUSE APP YOU'RE LOOKONG FOR. That being said, it's an amazing app for what it's actually supposed to do. I feel sorry for you developers, please rename the app if possible to avoid confusion. Kudos to you guys, this app is amazing.

Rating this 5 stars to try to offset the dolts who thought this was the audio social media Clubhouse, which if you took 2 seconds to glance at the screenshots or description you'd see it's not. Sorry you have to deal with that devs. Also, you have to install the app to review it, and the initial screen has the tagline "project management for software teams", so how on earth did people confuse this?

Giving it 5 stars because its actually a great tool. People need to check the screenshots just to see it isn't the Clubhouse social media platform that's popular at the moment. Stop damaging this small companies reputation!

There is noway to create an account.. The idea of this app is good... But I just surprised how bad do you make it... I can't even sign up... When I press the sign up button it send me to a Google form and when I type my email it just doesn't do anything, it's like a prank, are you kidding us clubhouse team?
Signing up is so hard. I am sure these difficulties are for keeping high security and privacy in this app. Keep working hard on this app. I always support new developers and companies. Good luck

Anyone looking for the audio-based Clubhouse app, this is not it. That particular app is in pre-registration and will be available on Google Play soon. In the meantime, here's a 5-star review to balance out everyone rating this 1 star because they're a moron who can't tell what app they're using.

I'm a member of a group that use clubhouse faithfully, but I have an androids and I can't seem to get on the app. I cant even start an account. It doesn't give me the option to do so. Need this fix asap. I'm missing out on so much informative information.

Downloaded and tried to sign up, the app said I already/someone had set up an account with my email. Asked to change password so I typed email address to send a change password page. Nothing was sent. I have an android. Does not worm

When I had the app I wasn't able to add my friends when I searched so I uninstalled it to see if it needed to update. When I tried downloading it again all I seen was this version and not the version that everyone has.
I'm sorry for the hard working team, that their work gets downgraded by people who don't read what they download. Great app keep on working on this PRODUCTIVITY APP

For the ppl who kept coming off nasty to the other ppl who couldn't see the blue button.. yall gotta chill.. no need to come off rude.. the app probably wasn't compatible with their phones.. 😑.. I downloaded and saw the button.. probably the issue was fixed.. take it easy.. its not that serious..
Sign up is available now on Android but you have to enter your email to be put on a waitlist. No need to keep the app on my phone if I can't use it. I'll update this when its available.

Giving this app 5 stars because of all the dumb people who think it's the audio app Clubhouse. Really?? The login screen literally says "project management for software teams". THAT has to ring a bell right?? Too bad this app gets so much negative reviews for nothing...

This is one of the best project management apps I've seen in a while! Can integrate well with one's workflow and it's a really good Trello alternative. For all the people rating it 1 star: it's not the app you're looking for; look on the apple app store and maybe you'll find it.

The android version of this app has no sign up button which the user is not aware of before downloading the app.If this app is genuine, that issue must be corrected.And if this app is not genuine, it must be pulled down. People's internet data bundle cannot go to waste like that.I can show proof by screenshot via the appropriate channel since this text box does not allow that. Reply with appropriate contact details and I'll show you in case you doubting

While the web app is really great, some features are missing on this app. For example I can't manage my epics, milestones,.. The application is fluid, I can manage my stories, and the workflow view is great.

A lot of people have confusion here with the app. I'm an Andriod user and I'm also searching for the clubhouse 'social media' app, which apparently is in a private beta phase and only for iphone users. So, this is not that app we're looking for. This is a different app for project management. And unknowingly these innocent guys have gotten bad star reviews (that's what I think happened).

Lots of features are not present as compare to website. Eg. There is no option to get the list of all projects I have created. As I switch from trello I love to move ( project > stories ). Please provide an option so that we can get a list of our all projects.

Not very material design-y and with some notable interface lag: if you update a task's status from within its description the update isn't picked up. Not being able to create epics is a real limitation as well.

Downloaded just to rate it, this is not the social media app people keep thinking that it is. That is only available on Apple, but people are too dumb to read the description for this and realize it's something else. Anyway, hopefully this helps them with the influx of people rating it one star cause they don't read descriptions.

Hey mate, this is not the "Clubhouse" voice chat app that you wanted. This is a project management app. Android version voice chat social media, "Clubhouse" is under development. Please be kind to other app developers.
This is not the Clubhouse people are looking for. You guys just write Clubhouse - Project Management Tool as the app name. It will avoid confusion to a lot of people and improve your rating.

I'm sorry for those who really want to follow the trend without reading the apps description, it's a cool apps tho'... Don't mind those stupidity, I know how hard it is to develope the apps and I completely understand, cheer up and God bless you for the app developer team, xoxo

5 million downloads hmmm wonder how many people didn't bother to write a review. C'mon people think before you don't get what you want because you downloaded the wrong ware. This is for Tech/Warez Engineering not audio drop-ins my friends, thanks! I want to follow the Vancouver Tech Culture, cheers.

Indeed I cant create a new account, only sign in. The first attempt to create an account went wrong (I don't know why 🤷‍♀️ ) and now there is no button to create an account anymore. I give up even without opportunity to open your app. 😕
Just giving a 5 start for the super meta panel image they put up about how there's multiple Clubhouses, make sure this is the one you want and to help balance out the 1 star troll wave. That is all.
Great management app! Also, people are so dumb and do not realize this is not the social media app... Good luck guys, hope the bad ratings don't affect the good work you have here!
There are multiple clubhouses and this one deserves 5 stars because of all the people incorrectly reviewing it. They even say they are not the Social Media site when you look at screenshots.
Balancing the dumb reviews from the users who didn't see the app description nor the logo. It looks like a good app so I subscribed to the wait-list.

Signing up failed with multiple attempts. A waitinglist doc shown up and ask to fill my email address, waited for days and nothing happened. 1st time encountered app ask to be on waitinglist. Adroid User

I have downloaded this application almost since one month. The acceptance of signing-up my account hasn't been approved yet and for no clear reason. This is the first time I face this kind of conflict nothing can be described except for being so silly...

I installed this app just because so I can rate it. The people who have rated this app on the basis of the other "Clubhouse" app are completely stupid. The Clubhouse app which you all are looking for and is promoted by Gary is only available for iOS devices. Go get your self an iPhone if you want to use that app so badly. Do not bash this app which has nothing to do if your expectations are not met. This one is not what you are looking for. This is for the businesses to manage their work.

Downloaded the app just to give it a 5 star. This is because a lot of dumb people thought it was the social media app that everyone is talking about; so they download it and gave it a 1 star for nothing. So just giving it a 5 star to fight the mass amounts of 1 stars by the people who did it.
This is clubhouse project management. NOT clubhouse drop in audio. It's a great app and giving 5 stars to balance out the idiots that couldn't differentiate
In full honesty I have no use for this app. I just want to help you fix your ratings. It's not your fault a same named app became trendy. I bet this Clubhouse is great too.
I decided to uninstall the app for asking me silly questions. I can't signup, what does that mean? And am angry 😠, wasted my data on a silly app. If you do a little more work, we will support you.
When i signed up, the application showed a note that i will be on the waiting list to accept my signing up process. I didn't figure such process. I think you need to fix this issue.

I'm giving my first review ever to this app just because I want to balance out all the illiterate fux who apparently believe that having an intellect roughly on par with that of a potato is a good enough reason to downvote an otherwise solid app. Sorry for all the dweebs, Clubhouse.

The app is obviously still in testing stage thus we have to be in a waiting list, make sense to me. Don't understand why there's so many 1 star rating complaining about not being able to sign up. Give it a few weeks guys
Signed up 3 months ago and still no response Idk what's the point of putting this app on Play Store it just seems to be collecting email addresses for whatever reasons.

It is easy to sign up for Android Tap forget password, an explorer would be opened, befor going forward uninstall the app, after that tap logging in and afterward you can sign up for free in next steps! Good luck!

So Bad, we can't sign up because we have an android, and we can't join until someone send us an invitation link, capitalism everywhere, i recommend reporting this app in order to remove it from playstore because they are getting money when we download it and suddenly we found ourselves out of users. This is exploitation. Please everyone who see this review, report this app in order to remove it from the store.
There's no option to create an account or sign up. It just says to log in. Then there's forget password, how am I forgetting a password when I ain't even got an account yet.

Great project management tool. Very responsive, seems like the developers care a lot. NOTE: If you're looking for the social media app Clubhouse, this is not it! This is a great tool for software development collaboration.

Nice service to plan agile workflows but the app mobile lacks features, doesn't refresh stories' workflow states, can't access to all needed settings, has inadequate UX and sometime crashes. I surely prefer use Clubhouse on desktop browser

I feel genuinely bad for you guys. All these people are so dumb they don't realize this isnt the same clubhouse app with the voice rooms. Even people that do realize it say "Very disappointed" because this isnt the app they wanted. Not going to lie I havent used this app but heres a 5-star because all these 1-star reviews are blatantly dumb.

ALERT THIS IS NOT THE AP THE BUZZ IS ABOUT. THE REAL CLUB HOUSE IS NOT AVAILABLE TO ANDROID USERS. BUT THIS AP IS NOT ONE BEING TOUTED ON TV. If it's only available to iPhone users then that should pop up right away and not waste the time with people that have Android's. I hope you fix this problem soon otherwise you need to flag it and say it's not available to people with Android phones

I think if this app is available in Play Store, i can use it. In case, i'm android user. But the reality i can't use this app (Sign Up and Login) because in fact Clubhouse just for iOS. It make me very disappointed. If you want the user from iOS just make this app available in iOS Store not in Play Store. Thank you.

I'm aware this is not the clubhouse app I was looking for which is not available on android. Happy to have stumbled on this app and have joined the waiting list, look forward to using it. Given 5 stars already due to all the bad reviews for the wrong app!

As a senior Product Manager, Clubhouse should not be reviewd low score just because user didn't figure out what they search for, it's not fair to this awesome team, thanks for Clubhouse create modern management tool for us.

Just came here to download the other clubhouse app and realised how disappointing people's reactions are by rating one star this app without reading its description. I feel sorry for the developers of this app really 🤦‍♀️ This app sounds really professional and could surely be useful to people who work in management! Good luck team!
This is not the Clubhouse you're thinking guys. You cannot listen to recordings. The Clubhouse you are looking for is currently available for IPhone users only.
The reason there is some backlash and confusion is because you've you're sharing the name with a hugely popular social media app which means that some users feel misled.
I am in wait-list to get signed up, are you guys kidding me. This is an mobile app not an appointment. Despite of advertising about your amazing work, 1st make sure it's working.
This app sucks, it doesn't redirect me from email links. And gets stuck at something went wrong. Totally not usable for me.

So many dumb illiterate millennials downloading this app and rating it 1 star because they can't read nor even look at pictures. This is not the social media app that your friends told you to join to be "cool". That app is on the Apple store. I have no faith in humanity. What's the point of going green to save the earth when it's full of imbeciles. Enjoy the 5 stars, hope it helps fix your rating.
After downloading this app, many of my other apps began crashing. This is also not the same Clubhouse that all the iPhone users are using -_- Do not download. This is a virus

Can someone give me some good reason why this app doesn't support for Android version? I was tried to be like waiting list almost a week but nothing response me back! Or the truth is there's will never made for Android 😒😐😏
I only use the desktop version of this app but it's the best project platform out there. Think the SDLC management of Jira combined with the flexibility of Trello.
Good luck with the app, guys! Funny naming occasion that isn't funny for you though.. Hopefully it will come to the end soon.

The idea seems cool but it's not a regular people app it's a actors only app. That's the only reason why people are actually interested in this The minute u take that away it will be gone So remember make sure there popular when u let them in

Till now .. i give this app 2 stars. 1 for the content. And the other for the creativity. (All of that i have heard from my friends), so I can't recommend using it or not .. because am in the WAITLIST !! WHY ???
This is an amazing app! And because I read what it was for and I know it is not the social media app it is for teams to work together and all that..
Funny how the app don't have a sign up button for Android users. It's as if you want an only Apple users environment. If that's the case why have it in the plays store? Uninstalling...
Boosting the rating because some people gave this app 1 star... Shows their lack of reading skills and mistaking this app with the other clubhouse app that is only available on apple, IOS.
As many have said, this is not the chat app and I'm eating this 5 stars because I feel bad the devs have to deal with 1 star ratings from people not knowing what this app is really is about.
Waited months to get registered. Should have just allowed for every platforms of tech. Making it exclusively for apple products is getting in the way of growing the app.

THIS IS NOT A SOCIAL APP! RIP to all those who thinks this is a SOCIAL APP. The Clubhouse social app is only available on iPhones! This is a project management tool. Stop searching it on Gplay, as the app is still in Beta and only for iPhone users. RIP!
I'm using android and the app crashed whenever I tried to register. Not a good advertisement for an app if it really wants be popular 👎.
Pretty limited in functionality, UI is really bad and has lot of glitches. Can't manage Epics and Milestones using this app.
Guys it's not clubhouse with invites to the conference, clubhouse hasn't uploaded to the play market yet, but that app good too.

This is a great app to manage my life and the app is superb because of new version and like to reccomend all of you people who like to make a great management...so please guys downlord the app and use it

No you are incorrect. The clubhouse website shows that we can login using iOS or Android. And under the android section, it points to this Google store link. Maybe the website owners should consider making it clear that android client is not released yet.
Just trying to help them out because people don't read. Seems like a great project management app though. Update: after trying it out, it seems like a great place to work through projects!

Hello everyone, this app is not the social media app 'clubhouse', this is a project management application. The social medical app 'clubhouse' is exclusively for ios not android and solely functional by invitation! Please stop giving this app low reviews as you are hurting the hard work of the creators. Delete your low review posts because they have nothing to do with this particular app! It's getting very annoying how your low reviews are causing so much malignancy to this application.
This is not the clubhouse that you wanna see. Don't leave 1 star because its not functioning. It's clearly a different apps and only available on ios, please give this app more stars🥺🥺🥺
Useless app. Cannot signup. When you click signup, it prompted to a gdoc for a 'waitlist to signup'. Wah. So exclusive ah? Not worth the time.
The social media app Clubhouse is not available on Android yet. Kudos to the developer here for bearing with all the 1-star review.
The version of this app for Android phones doesn't have the sign up button , just regular log in . So first timers on the app do not have access to the app

I heard about a chat app named Clubhouse that Kim Dotcom mentioned in one of his tweets. Was looking forward to seeing him chat live in the coming days. Turns out after I read the comments, that this is not the app he was talking about.. I went back to read the description, Low and behold this is an agile/management tool for Devs, Engineers, Managers and the like..... I came here to watch a Kim dotcom. I've rated this app to save the rating. I'm keeping because I'm a dev. Kim, hit me up.

Tried to sign up 3x and it sent me into a repetitive loop of signing up and getting told that there is no account under my email regardless of signing up 3x n manually typing in my email password. Over n over n over
NOT SOCIAL MEDIA APP; this is a great project management app however. I feel bad folks keep rating it low. It's a really good app for what it offers.
I downloaded the wrong app lol! But for what it is, this app seems really nice. It's very helpful with organization, I'm going to try & use it for my research team
Confusing interface. Overwhelms the user in terms of multiple options and forms. Also, the QA needs improvement. "Normal" is spelt as "nomral"

Totally downloaded before reading description this is innocent bystander with name of the social media app you're looking for no reason to put 1 star for own mistake to balance it here is 5 stars as a sorry for mistaking your hard work for something else.
Not sure how to use it yet but there is a sign-up button and very easy to get in after signing up.

Why i download this App because many of my Idols are using this and im curious to this app and i want to follow them but when i download it I can't sign up with my Android phone Its say Im in Waiting list what so ever but its been 1 week past They didn't email me.. so please fixe the problem po FOR THE PHONE USER
I do not have experience except installation and removal. You shouldn't be in the app store if people cannot use it anyway. Install it if you want to be in a wait list👎👎👎
compared to trello, i miss the integration to miro and its simplicity. this app is only a webview and is very slow and not native. i do not need development features for all projects.
Came to know about the wrong app reviews. Being a developer myself felt that. So just downloaded it to leave a positive review. I know it's a great app!
Seems this just works with IOS not android yet, I had "log in" trouble as same as others... Doesn't work with Google account even.. Wasting time!!

So this app only available for iPhone users only and I think the appearance of this app in here is just for mocking the Android users. Really disappointed because there's no sign up or sign in button available.
This app is not it. When you press the sign up button, apparently you have to put your e-mail on a google form? I've waited for few months and until now, there's nothing.

It I could give ZERO I would've.. IT'S A SCAM EVERYONE!!!!! BEWARE THEY DO NOT ALLOW YOU TO DELETE YOUR ACCT.. THEY TAKE YOU IN ENDLESS CIRCLES JUST TO SIMY DELETE ACCOUNT.. I'M IN THE PROCESS OF REPORTING TO FBI AND LAW ENFORCEMENT FOR INTERNET FRAUD.. 👌
It's not that the sign-up button is not there, it's invite only, one cannot simply sign up without being invited load of rubbish really, just use spotify
You aren't doing enough effort to bring the real Clubhouse app to Android and for that unacceptable delay, YOU DESERVE ZERO STARS..!!

"Downloaded the app just to give it a 5 star. This is because a lot of dumb people thought it was the social media app that everyone is talking about; so they download it and gave it a 1 star for nothing. So just giving it a 5 star to fight the mass amounts of 1 stars by the people who did it." -alireza hudson
Terrible experience compared to the desktop app. Labels are not all listed, not filterable
